global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail, predominantly brown with lighter underparts. It features a distinctive white eyebrow stripe and a slightly curved bill. The wings and tail are barred with darker brown patterns, and the legs are thin and pale.

part_details.body: Compact, rounded, predominantly brown with lighter underparts.
part_details.head: Brown with a prominent white eyebrow stripe above the eye.
part_details.bill: Short, slightly curved, and pointed, brownish in color.
part_details.wings: Brown with darker brown barring, short and rounded.
part_details.tail: Short, brown with darker barring, held upright.

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye on the head.
The short tail is positioned upright at the rear of the body.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, showing barring.
